content.text:
The elevated execution is currently unavailable for this session. To run the AWS infrastructure monitor script, I need elevated permissions enabled in the gateway configuration.

Please run the following command to approve elevated access for this session:

```
/approve
```

Once approved, I can execute the monitor script to check AWS CloudWatch metrics and detect any anomalies.
